name: trading-bot
description: Agentic trading bot — one command runs the FastAPI backend and the frontend together

scripts.setup: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && uv sync
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn src.main:app --host localhost --port 8000 --reload
scripts.app:tauri: cd frontend && npm run tauri dev
scripts.build:windows: npm run build:sidecar && cd frontend && npm run tauri build
